title: thalictrum simplex subsp. rhodopaeum
intro: Thalictrum simplex subsp. rhodopaeum, also known as Balkan meadow rue, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Thalictrum, belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Balkan meadow rue include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
